settings.heroSubheading: A brief description of what you do and why clients should choose you.
settings.aboutText:
We've been serving our community for over 10 years, bringing quality and care to every project.

Our team is passionate about delivering results that exceed expectations. We believe in honest communication, fair pricing, and standing behind our work.
settings.ctaText: Get in touch today for a free, no-obligation quote.

testimonials.name: Sarah
testimonials.quote: Absolutely fantastic work. Professional from start to finish and the results speak for themselves.

testimonials.name: James
testimonials.quote: We've used them twice now and both times they delivered on time and on budget. Highly recommended.

testimonials.quote: Reliable, tidy, and great attention to detail. Exactly what you want from a tradesperson.
